message:
fix: add RBAC role checks to MCP, namespace, RBAC, and SSE endpoints (#7500)

Add store.Store to MCPHandlers so role-based access control can be
enforced at the console level, independent of Kubernetes RBAC.

Mutating endpoints (POST/DELETE) now require editor or admin role:
- InstallGPUHealthCronJob (#7493)
- UninstallGPUHealthCronJob (#7494)
- CreateOrUpdateResourceQuota (#7490, #7492)
- DeleteResourceQuota (#7491)
- CallOpsTool (#7495)

Read endpoints exposing sensitive data now require viewer or above:
- ListNamespaces (#7485)
- GetSecretsStream (#7486)
- GetCustomResources (#7487)
- CheckCanI (#7488)

Fixes #7485, #7486, #7487, #7488, #7490, #7491, #7492, #7493, #7494, #7495

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
